start.text: I'm not very good at this... you know, distinguished traveler...
Just like playing a game? I'm not as good at competition as Lika...
I just need to stay back and shoot, right...?
Can't Eden just take over instead...?
Let me be clear... I'm not a professional in this area...
Please don't have too many expectations, distinguished traveler.

start_boss.text: In a field I'm not skilled in, just being serious might not be enough...
Don't worry about me, you're the one who'll actually get hurt...
In emergency situations, I'll hand things over to Eden.
If things go wrong, I'll be the first to leave the front line...
Isn't this something that shouldn't involve non-combat personnel in the first place...?
Looks like people in this star sector don't like to talk much either...
How many will sacrifice themselves this time... even though I can never prevent it.

retreat.text: Maybe this is what I'm better at...
It's time to hand this back to Eden, right?
Sorry, repairing these damages might take some time.
I'm always the one being protected...
Wouldn't it be better to have Lika do this next time?

out_of_missiles.text: Sorry... maybe I was a bit careless.

engaged.text: Holding out until the retreat order is given...
Don't doubt it, I'm not as soft-hearted as people might imagine...
I hope this star sector also has a place for souls to return.

need_help.text: Looks like we need to retreat?
Sorry, I'm not good at handling these situations, distinguished traveler
Do you want me to save this ship, distinguished traveler?
Perhaps letting an unmanned ship draw fire is a good choice...

pursuing.text: Pursuit...? This doesn't look like something I'd do...
Sorry... taking the initiative is what I'm least good at...

running.text: Maybe this is the only thing I'm good at on the battlefield...
Finally... looks like it's time to fall back.
Lika told me... the battlefield now belongs to mobility?
Don't worry... I'll protect this ship.

hull_90.text: I'll hang in there for now...

hull_50.text: Time to fully enter the retreat protocol, Eden?
Sorry, distinguished traveler, I need to retreat.
I'll try to save this ship... by running away.
Although I could probably hang on a bit longer... the emergency systems seem to have activated.
Ensuring the safety of space assets is necessary too, right...?

hull_30.text: I'm already leaving at maximum speed...
Looks like I'll have to suffer some losses...?
Ship losses don't matter? No need to comfort me.
Don't worry... after all, I won't actually get hurt.

overload.text: Uh... how do I handle this situation?
Sorry... this will definitely need repairs later.
Should I activate emergency protocols...? Not yet? Oh...

death.text: Eden tells me this journey has ended... sorry.
No need to be in such a hurry... I'm not actually on the ship

victory.text: I guess that counts as a success...?
I hope your next journey continues to be pleasant... distinguished traveler.
Want to give me a reward in person...? Lika said she'll accept it for me.
If you have time, come visit Crimson City and relax?
Perhaps one day I'll personally set out on a journey through the stars...
Eden says this is enough. May your military fortune be prosperous, distinguished traveler.
